violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the blower fans in the walk in coolers have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2026

The condensate from the Walk in cooler 1 refrigeration unit is freezing along the side of the wall. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2026

The walls, and ceiling in the dish wash area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Establishment is to deep clean, dish room. Change all ceiling tiles that can not be cleaned with, with non absorbent ceiling tiles. New Violation. Correct By: 04/05/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the walls in the dishwashing room, were observed with an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2025

The kitchen behind grease traps and storage room area have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. The presence of pests is not controlled as evidenced by rodent droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment is to continue with increased pest control. Establishment is to clean and sanitize all mouse droppings using appropriate means of sanitation. Establishment is to have pest control reports available to inspector. New Violation. Correct By: 08/22/2025

The presence of pests is not controlled as evidenced by rodent droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment is to increase pest control. Establishment is to clean and sanitize all mouse droppings using appropriate means of sanitation. Establishment is to have pest control reports available to inspector. New Violation. Correct By: 08/03/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the blower fans in the walk in cooler have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-Food contact surfaces must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 07/07/2025
The ceiling tiles in the kitchen, and above the pizza prep area are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/03/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in cooler fans have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 02/14/2025

The floors throughout the storage area have an accumulation of soil residue, droppings, and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/14/2025
Multiple ceiling tiles in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the walls in the dishwashing room, were observed with an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 09/23/2024

The ceiling tiles in the kitchen area are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. The floors in the storage room and under the 3-bay sink have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/16/2024

The presence of pest is not controlled as evidenced by droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Corrective Action - Droppings were observed on the floor in the cafeteria behind the pizza line, and in the teachers break area located off of the cafeteria. Establishment is to continue to work with pest control and is to clean any and all droppings. New Violation. Correct By: 08/09/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the fans in walk in cooler 1 and the walls in the dish room have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2024

Ceiling tiles in the kitchen area are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. The coving under the water fountain in the cafeteria is in poor repair. Physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/09/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2024
Refrigerator door gasket on the cold prep storage fridge was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2024

The ceiling tiles in the kitchen, cafeteria and back storage area are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. The coving on the floor in the cafeteria against the back wall is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the wall behind the dish machine has an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and chipped paint. The wall behind the dish machine must be cleaned and repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 10/27/2023

The condensate from the Walk in refrigeration unit is draining on to the floor. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. Establishment is to repair the unit to eliminate the condensate leakage. Establishment is to provide RIDOH with photo of repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/04/2023
The ceiling tiles in the food storage area and cafeteria are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/27/2023

The outside dumpster is not covered and were observed overflowing with trash. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 07/06/2023
The outside dumpster is not covered (lid is broken). Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 04/26/2023
The back storage/office area had some rodent droppings, establishments must be maintained by routinely cleaning and inspecting for rodent activity. New Violation. Correct By: 04/26/2023

The floor by the outside wall in the cafeteria is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. The ceiling tiles in the back storage area, above the pizza station and in the cafeteria, are in poor repair. Ceiling tiles, must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/26/2023
